TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Lilang ga niya mki sku Taycyo Si atu Wahe'i go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 145 buwan, 388 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 76% kyan ku 294 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 24% kyan ku 94 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 71%, Amis 2%, Bunun 1%, Cou1 %, Truku1 %. maki qu ngasal bziran ru kyokay. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Lilang hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Lilang hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Lilang hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Lilang hya' ga llyung. tay 'llaw na Lilang hya' ga Tbulan. tay 'zil na Lilang hya' ga Pasing. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ lilaŋ ɣa nija mki s~ɕku tajʦ~ʨjo s~ɕi atu waħeʔi ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan **%, amis~ɕ *%, βunun *%, ʦ~ʨou* %, truku* %. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran ru kjokaj. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na lilaŋ ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔzil na lilaŋ ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na lilaŋ ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na lilaŋ ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔllaw na lilaŋ ħjaʔ ɣa tβulan. taj ʔzil na lilaŋ ħjaʔ ɣa pas~ɕiŋ. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Lilang ga niya mki sku Taycyo Si atu Wahe'i go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 145 buwan, 388 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 76% kyan ku 294 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 24% kyan ku 94 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 71%, Amis 2%, Bunun 1%, Cou1 %, Truku1 %. maki qu ngasal bziran ru kyokay. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Lilang hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Lilang hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Lilang hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Lilang hya' ga llyung. tay 'llaw na Lilang hya' ga Tbulan. tay 'zil na Lilang hya' ga Pasing. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ lilaŋ ɣa nija mki s~ɕku tajʦ~ʨjo s~ɕi atu waħeʔi ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan **%, amis~ɕ *%, βunun *%, ʦ~ʨou* %, truku* %. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran ru kjokaj. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na lilaŋ ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔzil na lilaŋ ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na lilaŋ ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na lilaŋ ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔllaw na lilaŋ ħjaʔ ɣa tβulan. taj ʔzil na lilaŋ ħjaʔ ɣa pas~ɕiŋ. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
